full_name: Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology, Nagpur

facts: VNIT Nagpur (Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology) is located at South Ambazari Road, Nagpur-440010, Maharashtra.
Languages spoken: Hindi and Marathi.
Climate: All seasons experienced, normal climate. Nagpur is known for hot summers and mild winters.
Nagpur Railway Station is 7 km from VNIT Nagpur.
Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar International Airport is 7 km from VNIT Nagpur.
Nagpur Bus Stand is 6 km from VNIT Nagpur.
VNIT Nagpur has 10 boys hostels.
Aryabhatta Hostel has 1 or 2 sharing rooms.
S. Ramanujan Hostel has 1 or 2 sharing rooms.
M.S. Swaminathan Hostel has 1 or 2 sharing rooms.
V.G. Bhide Hostel has 1 or 2 sharing rooms.
A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Hostel has 1 or 2 sharing rooms.
C.V. Raman Hostel has 3 sharing rooms and is designated for 1st year students.
Homi J. Bhabha Hostel has 1 or 2 sharing rooms.
J.C. Bose Hostel has 3 sharing rooms and is designated for 1st year students.
Meghnad Saha Hostel has 1 or 2 sharing rooms.
Vikram Sarabhai Hostel has 1 or 2 sharing rooms.
1st year boys are allotted 3-sharing rooms in C.V. Raman or J.C. Bose hostels. Senior students get 1 or 2 sharing.
VNIT Nagpur has 2 girls hostels.
Kalpana Chawla Hostel.
Dr. Anandi Gopal Joshi Hostel.

mess.assignment: Every academic year is assigned a different mess.

monday.breakfast: Bisi + Sambhar + Chutney + Bread + Butter + Jam + Banana(2)/Boiled Egg(1pc)
monday.lunch: Rice + Dal Palak (Combo) + Methi Malai Mattar + Cucumber + Beetroot + Ragi Roti + Lemon + Poke Chutney + Boondi Raita
monday.dinner: Rajma Aloo/Baingan Masala + Amti + Roti + Sprouts + Lemon + Poke

tuesday.breakfast: Uttapam + Sambhar + Chutney + Bread + Banana(2)/Boiled Egg(1pc)
tuesday.lunch: Rice + Chana Dal Tadka + Sev Bhaji + Sambhar + Cucumber + Carrot + Bajra Roti + Lemon + Poke
tuesday.dinner: Soya Bean/Rajma + Roti + Salad + Lemon + Poke

wednesday.breakfast: Aloo Matar Sandwich/Omlet + Ketchup + Banana(2)/Bread + Butter + Jam
wednesday.lunch: Rice + Ragi Parota + Aloo Mattar + Sambhar + Cucumber + Beetroot + Roti + Poke
wednesday.dinner: Jeera Rice + Moongi Dal + Kadai Paneer/Masala + Bajra + Salad + Roti + Lemon + Gulur

thursday.breakfast: Menu Wada + Sambhar + Chutney + Rice + Mix Dal + Veg Mix
thursday.lunch: Rice + Sambhar + Salad + Cucumber + Beetroot + Roti + Lemon + Poke + Curd/Tomato Chutney
thursday.dinner: Chole + Puri + Rasan/Ragi + Roti + Salad + Lemon + Gulur

friday.breakfast: Masala Dosa + Sambhar + Chutney + Bread + Banana(2)/Boiled Egg(1pc)
friday.dinner: Peas Pulav/Masoor Dal + Paneer Tikka/Aloo Curry + Rasam + Roti + Salad

saturday.breakfast: Aaloo Paratha/Methi Paratha + Curd + Butter + Jam
saturday.lunch: Rice + Dal Fry + Palak + Sambhar + Cucumber + Bajra Roti + Roti + Lemon + Poke
saturday.dinner: Masala Rice + Rajma Dal + Veg Kofta/Aloo Mattar + Rasam + Beet Roti + Cucumber + Beet Root + Lemon + Poke

sunday.breakfast: Poha + Chutney + Banana(2)/Bread + Boiled Egg(1pc) + Butter + Jam
sunday.lunch: Rice + Usad Dal + Chicken Egg/Paneer + Rumpa/Onion + Ice Cream (Jowar Roti + Boondi Raita + Apple)
sunday.dinner: Dal Bhati Bhuji/Pav/Roti Bhaji/Biryani + Dahi + Papad

mess.notes: Salad includes tomatoes, beetroot, curd (any 2) at serving time. Curd is provided at all meals. 150g chickpea/dahl curry and 100g peas/mattar curry served whenever included. Bhatura served instead of puri once a month.
mess.cuisine: Mix of South Indian breakfast items (dosa, uttapam, bisi) with Maharashtrian touches (wada pav, pav bhaji, amti). North and South Indian lunch/dinner.

fee_structure.program: B.Tech/B.Arch 2025 batch (Even Term S-26, Academic Year 2025-26)

facts: Hostel rooms have LAN connectivity.
Classrooms, Library, and Mess have WiFi.
75% attendance is mandatory at VNIT Nagpur.
September: Cult Nite.
November: Freshers + Aarohi (cultural fest).
January: Department Gathering.
March: Institute Gathering.
3 washing machines are available in every hostel.
Department-level elections for CR (Class Representative) for boys and girls.
Department-level elections for CSR for boys and girls.
Cricket, Football, Volleyball, Handball, Futsal, Throwball, Kho-Kho, Lawn Tennis, Table Tennis, Chess, Carroms, and Swimming are available.
Chandramma Canteen operates morning to evening.
Main Canteen operates morning to evening.
Night canteens available in Homi J. Bhabha Hostel blocks 6 and 8.
Stationery shops available on campus.
Cycle repair shops available on campus.
Gym timing: Morning 6 AM - 8 AM, Evening 5 PM - 8 PM.
Different timing slots for boys and girls.
Free for all students.
Health centre open from morning to evening.
Free for all students.
Hindi and Marathi are spoken in and around VNIT Nagpur.
All seasons experienced. Normal climate. Nagpur is known for hot summers and mild winters.
